raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, my Citi bank credit card was charged {$14.00}, {$14.00}, and {$19.00}, all from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX I called my credit card company to dispute these charges. They canceled my card and issued a new one. Today, XX/XX/year>, I received a text message that charges were posted on my latest card, which I have not yet activated. Again, XXXX charges stated they were from XXXX + XXXX for {$14.00}, {$14.00}, and {$14.00}. I called Citi Bank again, and they will remove the charges. I have locked my card. I have also called XXXX, and they verified that I did not make those charges. The more significant issue is how anyone can access a card that has not been activated. I believe Citi Bank needs to do an internal investigation.
